mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID , USER_NM AS USER_NM FROM STOCTVUR WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TO_CHAR(LAST_LOGIN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, #{minusMonth}), 'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BIZ_TYPE = 'TC' AND UUID IN( SELECT TCCT.ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCTCCT TCCT WHERE TCCT.USER_ID = #{USER_ID})
DELETE FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BIZ_TYPE = 'TC' AND UUID IN( SELECT TCCT.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCTCCT TCCT WHERE TCCT.USER_ID = #{USER_ID})
DELETE FROM STOCTCRL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CONT_NUM IN( SELECT TCCT.CONT_NUM FROM STOCTCCT TCCT WHERE TCCT.USER_ID = #{USER_ID})
mapper.select: SELECT UUID ,UUID_SQ FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BIZ_TYPE = 'TC' AND UUID IN ( SELECT ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCTCCT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PROGRESS_CD = '4300' AND USER_ID = #{USER_ID})

SELECT UUID ,UUID_SQ FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BIZ_TYPE = 'TC' AND UUID IN ( SELECT VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCTCCT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PROGRESS_CD = '4300' AND USER_ID = #{USER_ID})
